products.name: Jollof Rice Mix
products.description: Classic West African rice blend with tomatoes, peppers and aromatic spices.
products.bio: Ready-to-cook blend of parboiled rice with sun-dried tomatoes, bell peppers and West African spices. The seasoning base draws from centuries of Senegambian cooking tradition.

products.name: Egusi Seeds
products.description: Ground melon seeds — key ingredient for traditional Egusi Soup.
products.bio: Dried seeds of Citrullus lanatus — a wild melon native to the savanna belt of West Africa. Rich in protein and fat, they are ground into flour for thick, nourishing soups.

products.name: Berbere Spice Blend
products.description: Bold Ethiopian spice mix with chili, fenugreek, coriander and 10+ spices.
products.bio: An Ethiopian spice blend of 12–15 ingredients including chili peppers, fenugreek, korarima cardamom, rue and ginger. Central to the highland cuisine of Ethiopia and Eritrea for centuries.

products.name: Suya Spice
products.description: Authentic grilling spice for suya skewers — smoky, nutty and fiery.
products.bio: A dry rub built on ground peanuts (kuli-kuli), paprika, ginger and hot peppers. Created by the Hausa and Fulani peoples — the backbone of West African street food culture.

products.name: Red Palm Oil
products.description: Unrefined red palm oil — deep flavor, rich color, essential for traditional dishes.
products.bio: Cold-pressed from the fleshy mesocarp of the African oil palm (Elaeis guineensis), native to the rainforest belt of West Africa. The deep orange-red color comes from carotenoids — the same pigment family as carrots.

products.name: Groundnut Paste
products.description: Pure roasted peanut paste for soups, sauces and spreads.
products.bio: Made from slow-roasted Arachis hypogaea (groundnut/peanut). Though originally from South America, it has been a cornerstone of West African cooking since the 17th century.

products.name: Bissap (Hibiscus)
products.description: Dried hibiscus flowers for vibrant deep-red tea — sweet, tart, refreshing.
products.bio: Dried calyces of Hibiscus sabdariffa, a flowering plant in the mallow family grown across tropical Africa. The vivid crimson color comes from anthocyanins — powerful natural antioxidant pigments.

products.name: Plantain Chips
products.description: Crispy salted plantain chips — light snack with authentic West African flavor.
products.bio: Sliced from Musa paradisiaca — the cooking plantain, a starchy relative of the dessert banana. Grows in humid tropical regions across West and Central Africa.

products.name: Moringa Powder
products.description: Pure moringa leaf powder — packed with vitamins, minerals and antioxidants.
products.bio: Ground from the leaves of Moringa oleifera — the "drumstick tree" or "miracle tree". Native to South Asian foothills, it has thrived across tropical Africa for centuries as one of the most nutrient-dense plants known.

products.name: Fufu Flour
products.description: Pre-cooked cassava and plantain flour for quick fufu — soft, stretchy, traditional.
products.bio: A blend of pre-cooked cassava (Manihot esculenta) and plantain flour. Cassava arrived in Africa in the 16th century via Portuguese traders and became an irreplaceable staple across West Africa.

products.name: Piri Piri Sauce
products.description: Classic African bird's eye chili hot sauce — fiery and tangy.
products.bio: Made from African bird's eye chili (Capsicum frutescens), a small but intensely hot pepper that grows wild in sub-Saharan Africa. The sauce blends Portuguese colonial cooking with Mozambican culinary tradition.

products.name: Baobab Powder
products.description: Dried baobab fruit powder — citrusy superfood with 6x more vitamin C than oranges.
products.bio: Dried pulp from the fruit of Adansonia digitata — Africa's iconic baobab tree. These giants live over 1,000 years in dry savannas from Senegal to South Africa. The fruit naturally dehydrates right on the branch.
